name: VeriDetx Corp.
summary: VeriDetx Corp. provides mobile device software solutions. The WebSafety software and apps allow parents to monitor their children's mobile device activities. These include mobile device, Apps downloaded, SMS messaging, Websites visited, device location throughout the day, geo fencing, posting to social networks, and curfew. The company was formerly known as Websafety, Inc. and changed its name to VeriDetx Corp. in March 2021. VeriDetx Corp. was founded in 2006 and is based in Las Vegas, Nevada.
